name: Linen
description: Linen — Slack and Discord community archiving tool that makes threads public, searchable, and SEO-indexed.

seo.title: Linen — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Linen: Linen — Slack and Discord community archiving tool that makes threads public, searchable, and SEO-indexed.

when_to_use: Public archive for OSS project community discussions
Search engine-discoverable support threads from Slack
Community knowledge base built from chat history
Slack channel archiving for compliance and audit

pros: Turns Slack/Discord threads into SEO-indexable pages
Low-effort way to grow community discovery
Reasonable pricing vs custom forum builds
Pragmatic answer to Slack message-history caps
cons: Niche tool — not a messaging API in the usual sense
SEO value limited if content quality is low
Not a replacement for proper community platforms
review.verdict: Neat hack for devtool communities that want public, Googleable knowledge without migrating off Slack.
review.best_for: Open-source and devtool communities archiving Slack/Discord threads publicly
review.not_for: Private internal chats or teams wanting a full forum experience

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
